data.content: Implementation reviewed on main: polling notification hooks are removed; notifications now fire only on session exit from SessionConnectionManager using beat title/id from terminal store. Verified quality gates in dedicated worktree: bun run lint (warnings only), bunx tsc --noEmit (pass), bun run test (108 files, 1811 tests passed), bun run build (fails on pre-existing Next prerender error in src/components/providers.tsx useState on null).
